description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during and around the Christmas and New Year holidays
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕節及元旦假期的跨境陸路口岸出行安排/注意事項

2024-12-23T16:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
Cross-boundary Travel related Arrangements / Notes during and around the Christmas and New Year holidays

The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a number of cross-boundary passengers using public transport services to travel via the land boundary control points during and around the Christmas and New Year holidays. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the land boundary control points will also increase substantially. The TD has put in place the corresponding traffic and transport arrangements. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. 


The public can make use of “HKeMobility” to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plaza of HZMB Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the service on real-time immigration clearance status of HZMB Zhuhai Port or「Zhuhai fa bu」WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),inorder to plan their journeys ahead. Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB main bridge. Vehicles shall not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. 

Members of the public are also advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port during and around the Christmas and New Year holidays to facilitate smooth access of public transport vehicles to above control points. Motorists are advised to pay special attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. 

Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's “HKeMobility” mobile application.
2024-12-23T16:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
聖誕節及元旦假期的跨境陸路口岸出行安排/注意事項

運輸署預計在聖誕節及元旦假期及前後，將有大量跨境乘客使用公共運輸服務經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門，而經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加，運輸署已作出相應交通及運輸安排，並在此呼籲旅客及早規劃行程，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。

市民可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署亦提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除非獲珠海市當局指示，車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。

市民亦請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在聖誕節及元旦假期及前後，或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。

運輸署亦請市民留意電台、電視台及運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service enhancement during Christmas  New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕新年期間加強服務

2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_EN:
To make trips more convenient during the festive season, MTRCL has added extra train trips and adjusted service hours as follows:
New Year's Eve (31 December) ​
- All local lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
- Disneyland Resort Line service hours will be extended
- Service hours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)

There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequencyof approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. 

The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows:
- 25 December and 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am
- 29 December and 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day

Please refer to MTRCL website for more information.
2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_CN:
為方便乘客外出歡度佳節，港鐵公司服務安排如下：
除夕夜（12月31日）​
- 本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站）
- 迪士尼綫延長服務時間
- 3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間

此外，12月20日至1月1日期間，部分本地鐵路綫於不同時段加密列車班次，總共增加2200班列車，其中港島綫及南港島綫於周末及假日大部份時間將加密至約3至4分鐘一班車。

而機場快綫會作出以下特別安排，方便出行旅客：
- 12月25日及1月1日：香港站頭班車提前於早上05:30開出
- 12月29日及1月1日：博覽館站尾班車延至翌日凌晨01:00開出

詳情請參閱港鐵網站。
